name: A2Z Medical Billing
description: Offers nationwide billing, coding, credentialing, and RCM services including eligibility checks, charge entry, claims submission, AR follow-up, and payment posting to reduce denials and boost revenue.[6]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Staff very professional and thorough, help quickly through credentialing process
Verify insurance promptly—usually responding the same day
Dream team...zero complaints after a year plus working with them
Excellent service with very affordable rates

sentiment.summary: A2Z Medical Billing has an exceptionally strong reputation with universally positive 5-star reviews praising professional staff, responsive service, quick processing, and reliable support.

name: AnnexMed
description: Delivers complete revenue cycle management (RCM) with nearly 20 years of expertise, covering patient access, medical coding, claims management, denial prevention, compliance, and financial analytics for multi-specialty practices including behavioral health, cardiology, orthopedics, and primary care.[1]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I would highly recommend AnnexMed Billing to any billing company.
Day-to-day customer service is incredible, helping navigate billing regulations painlessly.
It's always been a pleasure to work with them.
I have been very happy since I switched my billing services to AnnexMed.

sentiment.summary: AnnexMed receives consistently excellent reviews praising reliability, responsiveness, professional expertise, and transformative financial impact for medical billing clients.

name: BellMedEx
description: Leading medical billing firm offering billing and coding expertise for physicians and facilities across NYC boroughs like Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, and Staten Island, with tech-driven RCM solutions for primary care, specialty clinics, and urgent care.[2][3]

name: MBMNY
description: Full-service billing company providing end-to-end revenue management for hospitals and medical facilities, managing claims through validation and tracking, member of HBMA.[7]

name: Maxim Management Services
description: Medical Service Organization offering end-to-end administrative services, trusted for urology and cancer patient billing, including medical transcription, billing, and consulting.[7]

name: Med USA
description: Provides comprehensive medical billing services for physician practices, hospitals, and multi-location clinics, including billing, coding, credentialing, and compliance support, focused on primary care, internal medicine, and pediatrics.[1]

name: MediBillMD
description: Trusted partner delivering comprehensive, specialty-driven billing solutions with certified experts, focusing on accuracy, compliance, timely reimbursements, denial reduction, collections, claims processing, AR recovery, and practice management.[5][7]

name: Medical Billing Group
description: Healthcare financial services with experienced staff in billing and follow-up, interacting with various insurance carriers for timely filing.[10]

name: Millenium Medical Billing
description: Provides top-notch medical billing services for multi-specialty outpatient practices including cardiology, dermatology, gastroenterology, and oncology.[3][9]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Jane is simply amazing. My business would not be nearly as successful if it was not for her.
They are willing to go the extra mile to ensure proper insurance reimbursements.
One of the best decisions I have made to improve the functioning of my business.

sentiment.summary: Unanimously positive reputation with 20+ years of combined client tenure; reviewers consistently praise exceptional service, responsiveness, expertise, and deep personal relationships with staff.

name: Sybrid MD
description: Provides affordable billing services across 22 states to small to mid-sized practices and multi-specialty clinics, including A/R management, credentialing, telehealth billing for specialties like cardiology, dermatology, and nephrology.[3]

name: eBridgeRCM
description: Prominent billing company for over 40 medical specialties, featuring SaaS platform with real-time dashboards, denial management, compliance audits, revenue cycle migration, and HIPAA-compliant operations.[5]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Highly reliable partner for growing practices
Mental health billing made effortless - denial rates dropped significantly
They truly operate like an extension of our team
Recovered outstanding revenue - aging reports improved dramatically

sentiment.summary: eBridgeRCM receives uniformly positive reviews across medical specialties, praised for expert credentialing, billing efficiency, denial reduction, and measurable revenue recovery.

name: iMark RCM
description: Offers medical billing services across Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island, Long Island, Westchester, Hudson Valley, Buffalo, Rochester, Syracuse, and Albany, focusing on cash flow improvement, denial reduction, and compliance.[4]

name: iRCM Healthcare
description: Premium medical billing company with over 20 years of experience, offering end-to-end services like coding, billing, denial management, payment posting, A/R management, and IT solutions using AAPC-certified professionals and HIPAA-compliant technology.[3]
